partnershipPhilosophy.sectionDescription: Our approach: trust, transparency, and long-term partnership. MH Construction prides itself on being the answer before the problem through Professional Pre-Construction and Handoff Procedures. Every complex project presents a minefield of operational risks—MHC neutralizes the variables and secures your delivery. Every build introduces unique structural and regulatory challenges. MHC provides the precise project management required to navigate them on time and within scope.

leadershipTeam.sectionDescription: Meet the leaders who set the standard for accountable planning and construction expertise.

pageContent.label: About MH Construction
pageContent.heading: Who we are
pageContent.body: We are a veteran-owned general contractor serving the Pacific Northwest. We build long-term mission-partner relationships through direct communication, disciplined execution, and field-first safety.
pageContent.storyP1: Since 2010, we have worked alongside owners, operators, and design teams to deliver projects with practical planning and steady coordination.
pageContent.storyP2: Today we continue that standard with veteran-owned leadership, Procore-based mission administration, and scope control for agricultural and winery facilities, mission-ready fit-outs, and municipal projects. Built on Quality, Backed by Trust.
focusItems: General contracting for new facilities and occupied sites
Post-frame building delivery for agricultural and industrial operations
Door and hardware installation with compliance and handoff coordination
Mission management with RFI, submittal, and field-sequencing traceability
pageContent.leadershipBody: Our leadership model stays simple: clear decisions, direct communication, and full accountability from predeployment through handoff. Driven by Discipline. Defined by Results.
pageContent.safetyBody: Safety is embedded into daily operations. We maintain documented controls, practical field planning, and continuity for active facilities.

leadershipSources.label: Verified leadership sources
leadershipSources.sourceIntro: Validate Jeremy's leadership profile with public records and independent coverage:

common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

commitment.heading: Our Commitment
commitment.body: MH Construction, Inc. is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.

measures.heading: Measures to Support Accessibility
measures.intro: MH Construction takes the following measures to ensure accessibility of our website:
items: Include accessibility as part of our mission statement
Integrate accessibility into our procurement practices
Provide continual accessibility training for our staff
Assign clear accessibility goals and responsibilities
Employ formal accessibility quality assurance methods

conformance.heading: Conformance Status
conformance.body1: The Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) defines requirements for designers and developers to improve accessibility for people with disabilities. It defines three levels of conformance: Level A, Level AA, and Level AAA.
conformance.body2: Our website strives to be partially conformant with WCAG 2.1 level AA. Partially conformant means that some parts of the content do not fully conform to the accessibility standard.

feedback.heading: Feedback
feedback.intro: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of our website. Please let us know if you encounter accessibility barriers:
feedback.responseEta: We try to respond to feedback within 2 business days.

technical.heading: Technical Specifications
technical.intro: Accessibility of our website relies on the following technologies to work with the particular combination of web browser and any assistive technologies or plugins installed on your computer:
technical.outro: These technologies are relied upon for conformance with the accessibility standards used.

limitations.heading: Limitations and Alternatives
limitations.body1: Despite our best efforts to ensure accessibility of our website, there may be some limitations. Below is a description of known limitations, and potential solutions. Please contact us if you observe an issue not listed below.
limitations.body2: If you need assistance with any content on our website, please contact us directly and we will provide the information in an alternative format or method that is accessible to you.

assessment.heading: Assessment Approach
assessment.intro: MH Construction assessed the accessibility of our website by the following approaches:

improvement.heading: Continuous Improvement
improvement.intro: We are committed to continuously improving the accessibility of our website. As part of our ongoing efforts, we:
items: Regularly review and test our website for accessibility
Incorporate accessibility best practices in all new features
Provide training to our development team
Listen to feedback from our users

combat.subtitle: Service Recognizes Service
combat.title: Combat Veteran Discount at the Ready

description.highlight1: All branches, all ranks, all eras
description.middle: - Army, Navy, Air Force, Marines, Coast Guard, and Space Force. If you served in combat, we honor that service with
description.highlight2: preferential pricing on all construction services
description.suffix: . Each discount is determined through a screening process based on project scope, service record, and specific needs. No fine print. Your service matters.

allBranches.title: All Branches Welcome
allBranches.description: Army, Navy, Air Force, Marines, Coast Guard, and Space Force - all combat veterans qualify for consideration.

tailoredService.title: Tailored to Your Service
tailoredService.description: Every veteran's situation is unique. Discounts are determined case-by-case based on project scope, service record, and circumstances.

timeline.title: Combat Veteran Discount Screening Process
timeline.description: Our straightforward screening process ensures fair and respectful evaluation of every combat veteran application.

initialConsultation.title: Initial Consultation
initialConsultation.description: Contact us at {phone} or through our contact page and mention military service. We schedule an in-person or virtual consultation to review scope and requirements.

serviceVerification.title: Service Verification
serviceVerification.description: Provide proof of combat service (DD-214, VA card, or military ID showing deployment). We handle documentation with confidentiality and respect.

projectAssessment.title: Project Assessment
projectAssessment.description: We evaluate scope, schedule, and construction needs, including size, complexity, materials, labor, and budget constraints.

discountDetermination.title: Discount Determination
discountDetermination.description: Based on service record and project details, we determine an appropriate discount and communicate it clearly.

transparentProposal.title: Transparent Proposal
transparentProposal.description: Receive a clear proposal showing standard pricing, veteran discount, and final project cost. No hidden fees and no surprises.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.description: As a Veteran-Owned company, honoring combat service is a standing commitment. Every combat veteran receives fair consideration, respectful treatment, and meaningful pricing.

cta.note: Direct line to Veteran-Owned leadership for a straightforward conversation.

hero.descriptionComplete: Thank you to the Richland and Kennewick community, event leadership, and Project Stakeholders who made this event successful through coordinated execution.
hero.descriptionBriefing: Cool Desert Nights 2026 is scheduled for June 26-27 in Richland, WA, featuring classic cars, a Friday night cruise, and a Saturday Show 'n Shine in the Uptown Shopping Center.

logo.eventAlt: Cool Desert Nights official event logo

communityLeadership.title: MH Construction Owner Jeremy Thamert will serve on the official BBQ judging panel with his closest friends.
communityLeadership.description: Local leadership alignment supports coordinated community participation and clear communication with event leadership.

values.title: Service-Earned Values In Action
values.description: Event coordination follows the same operating standard as every MH Construction project: Honesty, Integrity, Professionalism, and Thoroughness.

thoroughness.title: Thoroughness
thoroughness.description: Details managed from schedule through close-out.

competition.title: Competition Overview
competition.description: Cool Desert Nights is a premier Tri-Cities summer event with classic cars, a Friday night cruise on George Washington Way, and a Saturday Show 'n Shine hosted in Richland's Uptown Shopping Center.

presence.title: MH Construction Presence
presence.description: Saturday Show 'n Shine includes hundreds of cars on display, plus family-friendly activities with a kids' zone, vendor booths, and community access points throughout the venue.

localImpact.title: Local Impact
localImpact.descriptionPrefix: Weekend programming includes Party in the Park, live music, food exhibitors, and a Saturday awards ceremony. MH Construction support extends to the Richland Kiwanis Pancake Breakfast,
localImpact.descriptionSuffix: , and the Party in the Park weekend draw.

boothMap.subtitle: Site Recon
boothMap.description: Our booth is staged near the BBQ competition lane for direct access to event traffic and the fleet showcase.

items.fridayCruise: Friday Cruise: Classic cars cruise along George Washington Way.
items.partyInPark: Party in the Park: Live music and community activities.

earlyMorningNotes.title: Early Morning Notes
earlyMorningNotes.subtitle: Arrival and breakfast details for the morning kickoff

items.cars: Classic cars begin arriving at 6:00 AM for shaded spots at Jefferson Park.
items.registration: Late car show registration opens at 7:00 AM at the Jadwin-side tent at the Uptown shopping center and closes at 10:00 AM.
items.pancakeFeed: The Richland Kiwanis Pancake Feed runs from 7:00 AM to 11:00 AM at Jefferson Park. Cash only: $5 kids, $7 adults.

action.title: Connect With the Team Before the Next Event Window
action.description1: Early online registration for cars, trucks, and motorcycles is available through the Richland Chamber. Vendor applications for 2026 are also being accepted through the chamber, and full listing details are available on Eventbrite.

readyToJoin.heading: Ready to Join Our Team?
readyToJoin.description: Start with the essentials: contact info, role interest, and resume (if available). If there is a fit, we follow up directly.
readyToJoin.enoughToBegin: Name, email, and role are enough to begin.

journey.lead: Clear steps. Direct communication. Respect for your time.
journey.description: The process starts with a short application and advances when role fit is clear. We keep communication direct at each step.
journey.goal: The goal is long-term fit, not extra steps.

submit.title: Submit Application
submit.description: Start with the essentials: your name, email, and the role or trade you want to discuss. Add a resume or background if it helps.

review.title: Team Review
review.description: We review your application against current project needs, open roles, and the standards we expect across the company.

conversation.title: Direct Conversation
conversation.description: If there is a fit, we reach out directly to talk through your background, the work ahead, and what both sides need from the role.

interview.title: Interview and Verification
interview.description: For strong matches, we schedule an interview and verify the details needed for the position, including references, certifications, or site requirements.

offer.title: Offer & Onboarding
offer.description: When both sides are aligned, we move into an offer, paperwork, safety expectations, and a clear onboarding plan.

fastTrack.title: Quick Start When Needed
fastTrack.prefix: When project timing and role alignment are clear, strong candidates can move through

typical.prefix: Timing depends on hiring needs, project load, and role fit, but the process remains

verifiedSources.sectionBody: These links support Jeremy's public leadership profile with government records, industry directories, and independent coverage. We use source-linked references to strengthen transparency and help visitors validate experience claims.

hero.founded: Founded 2010, Veteran-Owned Since January 2025 • BABAA (Build America, Buy America Act) Supporter
hero.mission: Built on Quality, Backed by Trust.
hero.serving: Tri-Cities HQ (Pasco, Richland, Kennewick) | Tri-State Licensed in WA, OR, ID

coreValues.sectionDescription: Four foundational values guide every project and partnership—focused on Built on Quality, Backed by Trust.

values.description: Full transparency with truthful assessments, open communication, and real-time timeline or budget updates. We provide clear cost breakdowns and direct guidance when a project is not the right fit.
Strong ethics means doing what is right, using specified materials, honoring warranties, and making decisions that prioritize client outcomes over shortcuts.
We show up on time, prepared, and accountable, with clear communication, organized site management, and ongoing professional development.
Meticulous planning and execution include detailed analysis, precision checks, documented quality control, and comprehensive final review with punch lists.

companyStats.subtitle: Disciplined, Proven Results
companyStats.title: Proven Track Record
companyStats.description: Measurable results from a Veteran-Owned team and dedicated BABAA supporter. We stay current on compliance-forward practices for federally funded government work.

hero.sectionTagline: Professional on the line. Thorough in the details.
hero.sectionDescription: Commercial, industrial, and public-sector delivery across Washington, Oregon, and Idaho from our Tri-Cities headquarters. We primarily focus on commercial and industrial work, and only consider unique, highly complex, multi-million-dollar residential projects. Built on Quality, Backed by Trust.

core.sectionDescription: Our core service is Procore-based project management for AG and winery community projects, commercial tenant improvements, and municipal builds. We align scope, schedule, and trade coordination while supporting specialty execution for pole buildings and door and hardware installation.

specialty.sectionDescription: Specialized support for complex project scopes, schedules, and operational requirements, including winery pond liner installation, pole building delivery, and door and hardware installation.

government.sectionDescription: Veteran-owned discipline and compliance-ready planning for public-sector and funded infrastructure initiatives.

areas.sectionDescription: Licensed and operating across Washington, Oregon, and Idaho with Tri-Cities headquarters support.

whyChooseUs.sectionDescription: Trust earned through transparency, proven safety, and a partnership model that outlasts project delivery.

testimonials.sectionDescription: Read testimonials from valued Project Stakeholders across the Pacific Northwest who have experienced our collaborative excellence firsthand.

services.sectionDescription: From planning to completion, every project reflects our core values—honesty, integrity, professionalism, and thoroughness.

expertise.sectionDescription: Experienced leadership, disciplined systems, and clear communication keep every project aligned and accountable. You stay informed from start to finish, and our AI-assisted analysis helps validate assumptions, reduce risk, and improve decisions.

process.sectionDescription: Clear milestones from first contact through close-out, led by disciplined project management in Procore with honest communication at each step.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: We start by listening to your vision and goals, then align scope, timeline, and budget whether you have full plans or an early concept.

steps.title: Detailed Estimation and Planning
steps.description: Our Lead Estimator provides a transparent cost breakdown with no hidden fees, plus risk review and a realistic schedule so you understand costs upfront.

steps.title: Contract and Pre-Construction
steps.description: We finalize clear contracts, secure permits, coordinate trade partners, and schedule materials. Your Project Manager handles submittals and RFIs while keeping you informed.

steps.title: Construction Execution
steps.description: Our Senior Superintendent leads on-site operations with award-winning safety standards. We manage execution in Procore, coordinate Trade Partners, track RFIs/submittals, run quality checks, and resolve issues quickly.

steps.title: Quality Inspections and Compliance
steps.description: Multi-point inspections at every phase support code compliance and craftsmanship. Third-party checks, agency coordination, and documentation keep milestones accountable.

steps.title: Project Close-Out and Follow-Up
steps.description: Final walkthrough, punch-list completion, warranty documents, and post-project support close the project cleanly. We stay engaged for long-term partnership support.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.description: Discuss your construction needs and build a clear plan with free consultation, transparent pricing, and partnership-focused collaboration from day one.

items.title: Construction Management

items.description: Complete oversight from concept through completion. Your project objectives executed with clear communication and proven expertise.

items.title: Master Planning

items.title: Procurement & Trade Partnerships

items.description: Expert supply chain coordination—sourcing quality materials and managing our network of trusted trade partners. No coordination headaches, just reliable execution.

items.title: Light Industrial
items.subtitle: Durable, High-Performance Infrastructure
items.description: Safe, durable industrial construction with 16+ years proven experience. Warehouses to processing plants built to exacting specifications with industry-leading safety standards.

items.title: Tenant Improvements
items.subtitle: Efficient Space Transformations
items.description: Transform your commercial space quickly and efficiently with expert craftsmanship. Minimal downtime, maximum results.

bottomNote.description: Our team delivers relentless professionalism to every client and trade partner on the line daily. From Handshake to Handoff, we got your 'six.' Professional on the line. Thorough in the details. No gaps. No guesswork. Just accountable follow-through.

testimonialGrid.comingSoonDescription: Testimonials will be available soon. We are committed to sharing only authentic feedback from our valued partners and team members.

clientTestimonials.name: Captain for Special Projects
clientTestimonials.project: Admin and Dispatch Center and Fire Station 10 Remodel
clientTestimonials.quote: MH Construction defines how a professional contractor should perform. Excellent business ethics and fiscal responsibility while their construction knowledge is above their peers. We value this relationship and hope to continue growing it on more Yakima County Fire District construction projects.

clientTestimonials.name: Jesse Dunagan
clientTestimonials.project: 40,000+ sqft remodel for new base of operations
clientTestimonials.quote: MH Construction's team has been an absolute pleasure to partner with, with principles deeply appreciated by our LCSNW team: ethics, curiosity, engagement, perspective sensitivity, honesty, humility, safety, quality craftsmanship, and objective-based solutions.

clientTestimonials.name: Keith Bjella
clientTestimonials.quote: MH completed a tenant improvement for us and we could not be happier. They helped facilitate design, permitting, and construction while handling many stakeholders in stride.

clientTestimonials.name: Brandon Christensen
clientTestimonials.project: Multiple commercial and AG community projects
clientTestimonials.quote: We have worked with MH Construction on several commercial projects over the years and have been very pleased with workmanship, communication, and timeliness.

clientTestimonials.name: Samantha Schuster
clientTestimonials.quote: We are grateful to partner with MH Construction and are very satisfied with the quality and professionalism of their work. Their attention to detail and reliable results have exceeded expectations.

clientTestimonials.name: Blake Still
clientTestimonials.quote: We could not be happier with the quality of workmanship. Todd kept us informed throughout the build and delivered a strong outcome.
